goal: Create a Python module that prints 'hello world' and a pytest test suite that verifies the module's functionality works correctly.
scope: Create test_hello.py with pytest test(s) that import and verify hello.py

acceptance_criteria.check: Verify hello.py file exists and contains code to print 'hello world'
acceptance_criteria.expected: File exists at hello.py with a print statement outputting 'hello world'

acceptance_criteria.check: Verify test_hello.py file exists with pytest test function(s)
acceptance_criteria.expected: File exists at test_hello.py containing pytest test case(s)
All tests pass with exit code 0

acceptance_criteria.check: Does the test successfully import hello.py and verify its behavior?
acceptance_criteria.expected: Yes - test imports hello module and asserts the print statement works
